creator: hoek@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: closed->open

As promised.  The WINE port is being updated and the update is 
signficant.  Please consider trying it again when you notice the port 
has been updated, or when/if I remember to close this PR a month 
from now.  http://www.freshports.org and wosch's "New Ports" email 
to ports@FreeBSD.org may both be useful.
